## Analyzers (1)

### [OTXQuery v2.0](https://github.com/TheHive-Project/Cortex-Analyzers/blob/master/analyzers/OTXQuery/OTXQuery.json)
Query AlienVault OTX for IPs, domains, URLs, or file hashes.

- **Author:** Eric Capuano
- **License:** AGPL-V3
- **Data Types:** `url`, `domain`, `file`, `hash`, `ip`
